author: Elijah Jero
name: AprilFools
short: April Fools fake scam giveaway prank
description: Lets the bot owner deploy a convincing (but harmless) fake scam giveaway message to any channels they choose. The rickroll link is disguised as a prize claim button. Run via DM so no one sees you set it up.
install_msg: AprilFools cog loaded. DM the bot and use [p]fool <rickroll-url> <#channel1> [#channel2] ... to deploy the prank.
